subfields.name: SupervisedLearning
subfields.definition: Learns the input–output mapping using labeled data.
subfields.applications: Spam detection, price prediction, medical diagnosis.

subfields.name: UnsupervisedLearning
subfields.definition: Finds hidden patterns in unlabeled data.

subfields.name: ReinforcementLearning
subfields.definition: An agent learns by interacting with the environment using rewards and penalties.

subfields.name: SemiSupervisedLearning
subfields.definition: Uses a small amount of labeled data with a large amount of unlabeled data.

subfields.name: DeepLearning
subfields.definition: Learns complex patterns using multi-layer neural networks.
subfields.applications: Image recognition, speech recognition, autonomous vehicles.

subfields.name: SentimentAnalysis
subfields.definition: Determines emotional tone within text.
subfields.applications: Customer review analysis, social media monitoring.

subfields.name: MachineTranslation
subfields.definition: Automatically translates text between languages.

subfields.name: NamedEntityRecognition
subfields.definition: Identifies entities like people, locations, and organizations in text.

subfields.name: TextSummarization
subfields.definition: Reduces long text while preserving meaning.

subfields.name: SpeechRecognition
subfields.definition: Converts spoken language into text.

subfields.name: ImageClassification
subfields.definition: Assigns images to predefined categories.

subfields.name: ObjectDetection
subfields.definition: Detects objects and their locations within an image.

subfields.name: ImageSegmentation
subfields.definition: Classifies each pixel of an image into categories.

subfields.name: FaceRecognition
subfields.definition: Identifies and verifies human faces.

subfields.name: MotionPlanning
subfields.definition: Plans collision-free movement paths for robots.

subfields.name: ManipulationAndGrasping
subfields.definition: Enables robotic arms to grasp and manipulate objects.

subfields.name: SLAM
subfields.definition: Simultaneous localization and mapping of the environment.

subfields.name: Ontologies
subfields.definition: Structured models representing concepts and relationships.

subfields.name: LogicalReasoning
subfields.definition: Derives conclusions based on logical rules.

subfields.name: SemanticWeb
subfields.definition: Makes web data machine-readable and meaningful.

subfields.name: RuleBasedSystems
subfields.definition: Makes decisions based on if–then rules.

subfields.name: FuzzyLogicSystems
subfields.definition: Handles uncertainty using degrees of truth rather than binary logic.

subfields.name: GeneticAlgorithms
subfields.definition: Optimization inspired by biological evolution.

subfields.name: GeneticProgramming
subfields.definition: Evolves computer programs using genetic operations.

subfields.name: CognitiveArchitectures
subfields.definition: Frameworks designed to replicate human-like general intelligence.

subfields.name: DistributedAI
subfields.definition: Multiple agents collaborate to solve complex tasks.

subfields.name: SwarmIntelligence
subfields.definition: Collective behavior emerging from simple agents.
